AgentKey is a plugin that connects your agent to live external data in one command. Install it into Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, or any MCP-based agent and instantly unlock access to search, web pages, social platforms, finance, e-commerce, business and crypto data. No integrations. No setup. Auto failover keeps workflows running.

Launch tags:Productivity•Artificial Intelligence•Data

SocialX

Blocks.ai

Blocks.aiThe Control Plane & Network Layer For AI Agents [...] You wire up one API for search, another for scraping, another for social, another for market data. You babysit a pile of keys and bills, and you basically have to understand the plumbing before you can even start. Most people who'd benefit from this never get past that part. So we built AgentKey. You install it like a plugin, and your agent gets access to a whole marketplace of capabilities behind a single account. No juggling APIs, no keys to manage, no need to be technical. One account, one bill, and your agent suddenly gets a lot more powerful. Right now the marketplace is organized into a few tiers, and it keeps growing: - Everyday tools: search, web scraping, social media - Professional data: finance, crypto, business data - Life and travel: weather, maps, trip planning, and more It [...] Hi Product Hunt, I'm Mogu, founder of Chainbase. Today I'm really happy to share the newest project out of our lab: AgentKey. It's been in private beta for a while, and a few thousand people have been using it and helping us shape it along the way, so it finally feels ready to put in front of you here. Here's the thing we kept coming back to. Agents have gotten genuinely good at doing tasks. What they don't have is eyes. They can reason and act, but they can't actually see the live internet, which is where almost all the useful tools and real-time data actually live. So you end up with a strange gap: an agent smart enough to do the work, sitting behind a window it can't look through. And today, giving an agent those eyes is a chore. You wire up one API for search, another for scraping,

results.title: AgentKey — One-Stop Live Data Marketplace for AI Agents
results.content:
# AgentKey — One-Stop Live Data Marketplace for AI Agents
## Agentkey

### Description
65 views
Posted: 10 Jul 2026
AgentKey is a plugin that connects your agent to live external data in one command. Install it into Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, WorkBuddy or any MCP-based agent and instantly unlock access to search, web pages, social platforms, finance, e-commerce, business and crypto data. No integrations. No setup. Auto failover keeps workflows running. [...] If you want to get your AI agent to fully perform, there's one tool you need to enable its potential. You want to research a competitor, pull what's going on on social media for content creation, find out what people are actually saying in certain industry, but your AI agent comes back with something so generic and boring. This is AI problem. No, it's information's accessibility problem. And there is a fix. My name is Luki. I'm a core team member at agent key and our team ran into the exact wall. That's why we built agent key. Agent key is the master key for your agent ecosystem. One API key, every data source your agent will ever need. Let me show you what's inside. Take a look at this. This isn't one or two integrations. 58 services over a thousand life capabilities. We have a search, [...] personal to everyday users. What AI related topics, news or debates are generating the most emotional reactions? Anger, excitement, fear or disbelief on threads, Facebook, Reddit and X right now. Focus on the topics from the last seven days. See this panel? That's agent key being called mid task. Before this, it couldn't pull structured post level data from different platforms. And now agent key solved it. We built this for ourselves first. If your AI agent also fails half blind, agent key is how you give them eyes. Sign up today and get free credits. Try it on your own agent.

results.title: AgentKey — Connect Your Agents to the World
results.content:
### Finance — 5 Services

TushareChina market data. Yahoo FinanceGlobal quotes and news. FREDUS macro time series. FinnhubMarket data and filings. Alpha VantageStocks, FX, and indicators.

### E-commerce — 7 Services

TaobaoItems, pricing, and reviews. JD.COMProducts and live prices. AmazonMarketplace rankings. 1688Wholesale listings. Douyin E-commerceDouyin shop catalogs. TikTok ShopSocial commerce products. BeikeReal-estate listings.

### Cryptocurrency — 14 Services [...] What can my agent do with AgentKey? −

Everyday research: what people say on X or Reddit, how a product is reviewed, what a long article says, token prices, GitHub readme summaries — the gaps native “browse the web” often misses. One AgentKey covers those fetches so you are not opening ten vendor sites yourself.

Do I need to write any code? +

No. Create an account, paste the install command from our Quick Install, and let the agent walk through the prompts. If you can copy and paste, you are qualified.

How much does it cost? +

Pick a plan — Lite, Pro, or Max — for a monthly credit balance that works across every service. Need more? Top up extra credits anytime. One subscription, no per-API bills.

Which platforms does it work with? + [...] # Connect Agents to the World
